notes: Ten timed events at non–Budapest Park / non–MVM Dome hosts: Operetta (Terézváros), A38 ×2 (Ferencváros), Akvárium ×3 (Belváros), Barba Negra ×2 (Újbuda), Müpa Bartók (Ferencváros), Dürer (Erzsébetváros). Catalog before ingest: 19 events; targets May–Sep scarcity outside Park/Dome.
missingOrUncertain: Akvárium MWAM / Asaf / Jamie: ticket tiers not in page HTML — entryFees empty; stage time 20:00 assumed after published doors.
Protest The Hero: doors 19:00 and show 20:00 assumed; tiers on tixa.hu checkout only.
Wagner Walküre end time 22:00 from Müpa program block; dynamic pricing 17,900–39,900 HUF — single floor tier only.
Black Label Society / Fear Factory: first band start estimated from doors (19:00 / 18:00).
Circus Princess matinee end ~13:30 estimated; operetta dynamic seat pricing not listed per performance.
